rationale: Heavy Russian air raids killing 11 and destroying a historic Kyiv cathedral are a continuation of the established war pattern, but the scale and symbolic destruction are notable; baseline decays slightly.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill 11 and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Heavy Russian bombardment kills 11 and destroys a historic Kyiv cathedral — a continuation of the active war pattern but with significant civilian and cultural impact for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: 'Island surrounded by war': Crimeans panic amid Ukrainian attacks
top_events.summary: Ukrainian strikes on Crimea signal continued offensive operations, which may affect morale and military dynamics relevant to Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Iran, US agree tentative deal to 'end war': Your questions answered
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal continues to develop; its impact on US attention and resources for Ukraine remains a background concern but no confirmed change in Western support for Ukraine.
